Eyebrow / Subtitle
## Questions?  
We’ve got answers
Details on pricing, features, and how everything works. If you don’t see what you’re looking for, our team is here to help.
### Am I paying twice — subscription and credits?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
No. For paid plans, your subscription price is included as monthly credits.   
You also get unlimited usage within your plan’s included CPU tier.
### What does “unlimited CPU usage” mean?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Each plan includes unlimited usage for a specific CPU tier (mini or large).If you run workloads outside your included tier, credits are used.
### When are credits required?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Credits are required when you:  
‍  
• Run a higher CPU tier than your plan includes  
• Run GPU-based workloads  
• Run quantum (QPU) jobs  
  
This applies to all plans, including Premium.
### What happens if I run out of credits?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Your workloads pause. There are no automatic coverages.  
You can add credits or upgrade your plan at any time.
### Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan later?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Yes. You can change your plan at any time as your usage grows or changes.
### What’s the difference between Individual and Team plans?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Team plans are designed for collaboration and include:  
  
• Shared credits across users  
• Team workspaces  
• Priority execution and support
### Do unused credits roll over?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Credits reset monthly. For long-term or custom usage needs, Team and Enterprise plans can be tailored.
### Is Enterprise pricing really custom?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/639a397b9711984d91a35d74/67cdeb9fb77d31d5d2b2f2ef_icon-plus.svg)
Yes. Enterprise plans are designed around your infrastructure, workload patterns, and support requirements.Contact us to discuss your needs.
Get Started

Questions?
We’ve got answers

Details on pricing, features, and how everything works. If you don’t see what you’re looking for, our team is here to help.

Am I paying twice — subscription and credits?

No. For paid plans, your subscription price is included as monthly credits.
You also get unlimited usage within your plan’s included CPU tier.

What does “unlimited CPU usage” mean?

Each plan includes unlimited usage for a specific CPU tier (mini or large).If you run workloads outside your included tier, credits are used.

When are credits required?

Credits are required when you:
‍
•  Run a higher CPU tier than your plan includes
•  Run GPU-based workloads
•  Run quantum (QPU) jobs

This applies to all plans, including Premium.

What happens if I run out of credits?

Your workloads pause. There are no automatic coverages.
You can add credits or upgrade your plan at any time.

Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan later?

Yes. You can change your plan at any time as your usage grows or changes.

What’s the difference between Individual and Team plans?

Team plans are designed for collaboration and include:

•  Shared credits across users
•  Team workspaces
•  Priority execution and support

Do unused credits roll over?

Credits reset monthly. For long-term or custom usage needs, Team and Enterprise plans can be tailored.

Is Enterprise pricing really custom?

Yes. Enterprise plans are designed around your infrastructure, workload patterns, and support requirements.Contact us to discuss your needs.
